zh.lifeSummary: 當Sophia von Brandenburg於1303年出生在海因里希_庫爾斯騰圖姆 布藍登波格可萊斯 維斯塔維利藍德布藍登波格 安 德 哈維爾時，她的父親Heinrich I "Lackland" Unknown , Margrave of Brandenburg-Stendal47歲，母親Gräfin Agnes von Bayern27歲。她於大約1327年與Magnus I. Herzog von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1356年在德國海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福格廷根享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sophia von Brandenburg于1303年出生在海因里希_庫爾斯騰圖姆 布藍登波格可萊斯 維斯塔維利藍德布藍登波格 安 德 哈維爾时，她的父亲Heinrich I "Lackland" Unknown , Margrave of Brandenburg-Stendal47岁，母亲Gräfin Agnes von Bayern27岁。她于大约1327年与Magnus I. Herzog von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1356年在德国海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福格廷根享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Brandenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from Brandenburg, the name of a province, its principal city, and numerous other places.

variants.name: Brandenberg
meanings: German and Swiss German: habitational name from any of several minor places called Brandenberg, for example in Bavaria and Rhineland.
German: in some cases, probably also a variant of   Brandenburg  .

variants.name: Brandenburger
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from Brandenburg (see   Brandenburg  ).

nameMeanings.name: Sophia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek word meaning ‘wisdom’. The Eastern cult of  St Sophia  arose as a result of misinterpretation of the phrase Hagia Sophia ‘holy wisdom’ as if it meant ‘St Sophia’. The name became popular in England in the 17th and 18th centuries—the heroine of  Fielding's  novel Tom Jones (  1749 ) is called  Sophia Weston—and  has been increasing in popularity since the 1990s. In Scotland it has been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Beathag .

en.lifeSummary: When Sophia von Brandenburg was born in 1303, in Brandenburg an der Havel, Westhavelland, Brandenburg, Prussia, her father, Heinrich I "Lackland" Unknown , Margrave of Brandenburg-Stendal, was 47 and her mother, Gräfin Agnes von Bayern, was 27. She married Magnus I. Herzog von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel about 1327. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1356, in Göttingen, Hanover, Prussia, Germany, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sophia von Brandenburg est née en 1303, à Brandenburg an der Havel, Kreis Westhavelland, Kurfürstentum Brandenburg, Prusse, son père, Heinrich I "Lackland" Unknown , Margrave of Brandenburg-Stendal, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Gräfin Agnes von Bayern, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Magnus I. Herzog von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel environ 1327. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1356, à Göttingen, Hanovre, Prusse, Allemagne, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.Brandenburg, Brandenburg, Deutschland: Brandenburg an der Havel, Kreis Westhavelland, Kurfürstentum Brandenburg, Preußen
de.lifeSummary: Als Sophia von Brandenburg 1303 in Brandenburg an der Havel, Kreis Westhavelland, Kurfürstentum Brandenburg, Preußen geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Heinrich I "Lackland" Unknown , Margrave of Brandenburg-Stendal 47 und ihre Mutter Gräfin Agnes von Bayern 27. Sie hat um 1327 Magnus I. Herzog von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1356 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Göttingen, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Deutschland.

Lei sposato Magnus I. Herzog von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel circa 1327. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1356, nel Göttingen, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Germania, all'età di 53 anni.

Herzog von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1356年にドイツプレウssンプロヴィンズ ハノバーグoッティンジェンで53歳で死去した。

ko.Brandenburg, Brandenburg, Deutschland: 프레우ss 커프u르스투 브랜덴버그 크레이스 웨스스아벨랜드 브랜덴버그 앤 데르 하벨
ko.lifeSummary: Sophia von Brandenburg(이)가 1303년 프레우ss 커프u르스투 브랜덴버그 크레이스 웨스스아벨랜드 브랜덴버그 앤 데르 하벨에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Heinrich I "Lackland" Unknown , Margrave of Brandenburg-Stendal(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gräfin Agnes von Bayern(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1327년 Magnus I. Herzog von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1356년 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 해노버 그o틴겐에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sophia von Brandenburg nasceu em 1303, em Brandenburg an der Havel, Kreis Westhavelland, Kurfürstentum Brandenburg, Preußen, seu pai, Heinrich I "Lackland" Unknown , Margrave of Brandenburg-Stendal, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Gräfin Agnes von Bayern, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Magnus I. Herzog von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel aproximadamente 1327. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1356, em Göttingen, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Alemanha, com 53 anos.

ru.Brandenburg, Brandenburg, Deutschland: брэнденбург ан дир хавел, крис веставелланд, курфuрстентум брэнденбург, Пруссия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sophia von Brandenburg родилась в 1303 г. в местности брэнденбург ан дир хавел, крис веставелланд, курфuрстентум брэнденбург, Пруссия, её отцу по имени Heinrich I "Lackland" Unknown , Margrave of Brandenburg-Stendal было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Gräfin Agnes von Bayern, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Magnus I. Herzog von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel около 1327 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1356 г. в местности гoттинген, провинз ханновир, Пруссия, Германия в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sophia von Brandenburg nació en 1303, en Brandenburg an der Havel, Kreis Westhavelland, Kurfürstentum Brandenburg, Preußen, su papá, Heinrich I "Lackland" Unknown , Margrave of Brandenburg-Stendal, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Gräfin Agnes von Bayern, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Magnus I. Herzog von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel aproximadamente 1327. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1356, en Göttingen, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Alemania, a la edad de 53 años.
